title: ITC Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: ITC Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
ITC Limited has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ITC Limited:
ITC Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Limited!
